http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/communi.label: communicates with
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/communi.description: The subject is an application component that communicates with another application component.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/entityT.label: entity type component
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/entityT.description: The subject is an entity type that has another entity type as component (part).

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/isBased.label: is based on
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/isBased.description: Der Objekttyp wird von einem anderen Objekttyp erzeugt.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/softwar.label: software product
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/softwar.description: The software product under which a computer based application component is distributed.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/support.label: supports
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/support.description: A function that an application component supports.

http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#lab.label: label
http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#lab.description: A human-readable name for the subject.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/EntityT.label: entity type
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/EntityT.description: An entity type is any kind of information that is consumed, produced or modified by a task. These can be documents, data structures, objects, roles, specified by data types or even paper based artifacts.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/decreas.label: decreases
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/decreas.description: The subject is a function that decreases a measurable entity type.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/functio.label: function component
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/functio.description: The subject is a function that has another function as component (part).

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/increas.label: increases
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/increas.description: The subject is a function that increases a measurable entity type.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/updates.label: updates
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/updates.description: The subject is a function that updates an entity type.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/uses.label: uses
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/uses.description: The function requires data about the entity type.

http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#lab.label: label
http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#lab.description: A human-readable name for the subject.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/Functio.label: Function
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/Functio.description: Functions describe what is to be done in IM departments. They update or use information which is represented by entity.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/Functio.label: Function
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/Functio.description: Functions describe what is to be done in IM departments. They update or use information which is represented by entity.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/Role.label: role
http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/Role.description: Rollen beschreiben Personen und Personengruppen, die im Rahmen des Informationsmanagements im Krankenhaus und der Patientenbehandlung anzutreffen sind.

http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#sub.description: The subject is a subclass of a class.

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/isInvol.description: Die Rolle ist in der Aufgabe involviert, z.B. durch Teilnahme oder operative Mitarbeit

http://www.snik.eu/ontology/meta/isRespo.description: is responsible for an entity type

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broa.label: has broader match
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broa.description: skos:broadMatch is used to state a hierarchical mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#clos.label: has close match
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#clos.description: skos:closeMatch is used to link two concepts that are sufficiently similar that they can be used interchangeably in some information retrieval applications. In order to avoid the possibility of "compound errors" when combining mappings across more than two concept schemes, skos:closeMatch is not declared to be a transitive property.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#exac.label: has exact match
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#exac.description: skos:exactMatch is disjoint with each of the properties skos:broadMatch and skos:relatedMatch.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#narr.label: has narrower match
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#narr.description: skos:narrowMatch is used to state a hierarchical mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.

http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#rela.label: has related match
http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#rela.description: skos:relatedMatch is used to state an associative mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.
